stemHtml: In a steady, level, co-ordinated turn the load factor n and the stall speed V<sub>S</sub> will be:

options.a: n smaller than 1, V<sub>S</sub> lower than in straight and level flight.
options.b: n greater than 1, V<sub>S</sub> higher than in straight and level flight.
options.c: n greater than 1, V<sub>S</sub> lower than in straight and level flight.
options.d: n smaller than 1, V<sub>S</sub> higher than in straight and level flight.
